title: sqlite3_update_hook gives incorrect table name with shared cache
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String, age UInt32 CHECK(age >= 0), created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
CREATE TABLE orders (id UInt32, user_id UInt32, amount Float64 NOT NULL, order_date DateTime DEFAULT now(), FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
ALTER TABLE orders UPDATE amount = NULL WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: sqlite3_update_hook with shared cache returns wrong table name
